settings.title: Settings
settings.label: Label
settings.logRequestCount: Number of requests to log (most recent)

client_id.title: BMW CarData Client ID
client_id.description: Enter your BMW CarData API Client ID to continue. You must register your own application at the BMW Developer Portal to obtain a Client ID.
client_id.label: Client ID
client_id.help: Your Client ID is a UUID in the format: xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx

how_to_get.title: How to get a Client ID
how_to_get.step1: Go to the BMW Developer Portal (https://customer.bmwgroup.com/cardata)
how_to_get.step2: Create an account or log in with your existing BMW credentials
how_to_get.step3: Register a new application - choose 'Car Data API'
how_to_get.step4: Copy your Client ID from the application details

container_id.label: Container ID (Optional)
container_id.help: Leave empty to create a new container automatically. If you have multiple vehicles with the same Client ID, they will share the same container. Only provide an existing Container ID if you want to reuse one.

device_code.title: BMW CarData Authentication
device_code.instructions: Follow these steps to authorize access to your BMW:
device_code.step1: 1. Click the button below to open your browser
device_code.step3: 3. Complete the authorization in your browser

error.title: Authorization Failed
error.request_failed: Failed to request authorization code. Please try again.
error.expired: Authorization code expired. Please try again.
error.auth_failed: Authorization failed. Please complete the authorization in your browser.
error.user_denied: Authorization was denied. Please try again and complete the authorization.
error.network_error: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
error.timeout: Authorization timed out. Please try again.
